description: Google's My Business Account Management API lets developers manage Google Business Profile account access, invitations, admins, and related account metadata. It is part of the Business Profile APIs used to administer business locations and account permissions on Google.
summary: One authenticated HTTP API surface: the My Business Account Management REST API at `https://mybusinessaccountmanagement.googleapis.com/v1`, with an OpenAPI spec available via APIs.guru; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface found for this domain.
